mapper.insert: INSERT INTO refresh_tokens ( user_id, hospital_id, client_id, client_name, token_hash, rotated_from_id, expires_at, revoked_at, revoked_reason, ip_address, user_agent, created ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{hospitalId}, #{clientId}, #{clientName}, #{tokenHash}, #{rotatedFromId}, #{expiresAt}, #{revokedAt}, #{revokedReason}, #{ipAddress}, #{userAgent}, NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id AS userId, hospital_id AS hospitalId, client_id AS clientId, client_name AS clientName, token_hash AS tokenHash, rotated_from_id AS rotatedFromId, expires_at AS expiresAt, revoked_at AS revokedAt, revoked_reason AS revokedReason, ip_address AS ipAddress, user_agent AS userAgent FROM refresh_tokens WHERE token_hash = #{tokenHash} LIMIT 1

SELECT id, user_id AS userId, hospital_id AS hospitalId, client_id AS clientId, client_name AS clientName, token_hash AS tokenHash, rotated_from_id AS rotatedFromId, expires_at AS expiresAt, revoked_at AS revokedAt, revoked_reason AS revokedReason, ip_address AS ipAddress, user_agent AS userAgent FROM refresh_tokens WHERE token_hash = #{tokenHash} AND revoked_at IS NULL AND expires_at > NOW() LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE refresh_tokens SET revoked_at = NOW(), revoked_reason = 'EXPIRED' WHERE revoked_at IS NULL AND expires_at <= #{now}
